title: Mechanical Engineer
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

e-Tag RFID Pte Ltd is a Technology Information Technology Company who has the turn key solution from hardware to Software development capabilities. E-Tag has its own RFID Tag manufacturing facility opening in the revitalized Yishun Northspring Bizhub in North of Singapore. e-TAG untapped the possibility of using plastics injection molding by designing its unique FULLY-MOLDED RFID tag that provides an extra protection of the RFID inlay that enhances the lifespan of the tag. While most other tag manufacturers uses ultra-sonic welding or epoxy bonding for sealing the inlay, which in time, the tag's read performance will slowly deteriorates even in weeks time. In addition to business clients, e-TAG will be supporting client on tag’s customization to project realization. The industrial community in ASIA has experienced explosive growth in RFID technology and will serve as a strong customer base for E-Tag. currently, we have expanded to Myanmar and France as our IT hub and Sales office in Europe.

Job Summary
Design and develop new design of metal cabinet and trolley for tools storage.

Responsibilities

  • Create detailed 2D and 3D technical drawings using SolidWorks and AutoCAD to support product design and development
  • Design and develop metal cabinets and tools trolleys to meet functional and production requirements
  • Operate plastic injection molding machines to produce RFID tags, ensuring quality and efficiency in manufacturing
  • Collaborate closely with manufacturers and suppliers to oversee the fabrication and production processes of tool cabinets and trolleys, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to specifications
